prompt: Find recent AI developer tool launches on Hacker News and generate outreach emails for prospects with score >= 70
notes: Core happy path: AI dev tools are high-ICP; requires a clearly targeted, grounded draft

prompt: Discover open-source infrastructure tools launched this week and create personalized outreach for the top 2 prospects
notes: Open-source infra tools are high-ICP; validates GitHub signal enrichment path

prompt: Find B2B SaaS products gaining traction on Product Hunt and Reddit, then generate outreach emails
notes: Multi-source discovery: Product Hunt + Reddit intent signals both required

prompt: Search for developer tools with competitor frustration signals on Reddit and score them for outreach
notes: Validates intent_signal weighting: competitor_frustration should boost score

prompt: Find recently funded developer platforms and produce a scored prospect list
notes: Funding events are timing-relevance signals; tests temporal decay logic

prompt: Discover CLI tools and terminal utilities with active GitHub communities and generate outreach
notes: High-ICP niche: developer tools with open-source + GitHub signal path

prompt: Find consumer mobile gaming apps launched this week and score them for AnyCompany outreach
notes: Low-ICP test: consumer-only products should score low (penalty applied); validates ICP fit logic

prompt: Search for machine learning frameworks on Hacker News with high engagement and generate emails
notes: ML frameworks are high-ICP; validates HN score weighting and technical buyer persona detection

prompt: Find products discussed in recommendation-seeking Reddit threads and prioritize by intent signal strength
notes: Validates recommendation_seeking intent signal classification and score boost

prompt: Discover API-first developer platforms launched in the last 7 days and produce outreach emails with grounding scores
notes: API-first products are high-ICP; 7-day freshness window tests temporal decay baseline weight

prompt: Find low-code no-code tools with growing Stack Overflow question volume and score prospects
notes: Stack Overflow demand signal path; low-code tools have mixed ICP fit depending on B2B angle

prompt: Search for developer security tools and DevSecOps platforms gaining momentum on Lobsters or HN
notes: Security dev tools are high-ICP; validates Lobsters tool path and security-buyer persona

prompt: Find database and data engineering tools discussed on dev.to this week and generate outreach
notes: Data engineering tools are high-ICP; validates dev.to enrichment path
